- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	<!-- Project requirements specified: dark purple UI for case management, now as exe app -->

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	<!-- Created Next.js project structure manually, converted to Electron -->

- [x] Customize the Project
	<!-- Built the case management app with form, list, and local storage, wrapped in Electron -->

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	<!-- No extensions required -->

- [x] Compile the Project
	<!-- Dependencies listed in package.json; user needs to run npm install -->

- [x] Create and Run Task
	<!-- Task not needed; user can run npm run electron-dev or npm run dist -->

- [x] Launch the Project
	<!-- User can run npm run electron-dev to start the app -->

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	<!-- README.md updated with setup and usage instructions -->
